adapter_name.title: Name
adapter_name.description: Provide a unique name for this adapter instance. Example: compatible-emb-1

model.title: Model
model.description: The embedding model name expected by your OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Examples: text-embedding-3-small, BAAI/bge-m3, nomic-embed-text

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: API key for your OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Leave empty if the endpoint does not require one.

api_base.title: API Base
api_base.description: Base URL for the OpenAI-compatible embeddings endpoint. Examples: https://gateway.example.com/v1, https://llm.example.net/openai/v1

max_retries.title: Max Retries
max_retries.description: The maximum number of times to retry a request if it fails.
